# Tech stack docs (source)

## Why this folder exists

Vite + React mini-site in `site/tech-stack-generator/`; build output is written to `site/tech-stack-docs/`.

## What is here

- src/ — pages and data
- vite.config.ts — outDir `Documents/tech-stack-generated`

## See also

- `Readme.md`
- `Readme_Techstack.md`
